blended.narrative: Cranmore Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,833 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
